tier_rationale: Creator economy tier. Signal amplification via audience reach — every creator-operator becomes a distribution node. High network effect. Feeds awareness funnel for other tiers.
tagline: A content creator monetizing an audience who has no idea what's actually working.

psychographics.core_belief: Attention is the asset — monetization follows resonance.
psychographics.fear: Algorithm change wiping out the audience.
psychographics.ambition: Productize the audience into recurring revenue that doesn't depend on the next post.
psychographics.status_anxiety: Still being seen as an influencer, not a real business.

pain_points.pain: No idea which content is actually driving revenue
Platform dependency — one algorithm change could kill it
Revenue is unpredictable — sponsorship cycles, launch cycles
Hard to repurpose across platforms without losing signal

desired_outcomes.outcome: Owned audience (email/SMS) that algorithm can't touch
Productize knowledge into a recurring revenue engine

buying_triggers.trigger: Hit a follower milestone but revenue didn't move
Competitor creator launched a product and it sold out
Posted something that flopped despite high effort

objections.objection: I'm a creator, not a business operator
objections.counter_angle: Show creator-native UX; no spreadsheets, no dashboards — just 'what's working right now'.

objections.objection: I already use creator analytics tools
objections.counter_angle: Position as 'one layer above the per-platform metrics' — cross-platform resonance.

objections.objection: I don't want my process to feel corporate
objections.counter_angle: The system is invisible — it feeds recommendations, not reports.

objections.objection: My niche is too specific for templates
objections.counter_angle: Templates are starting points; the system learns your voice.

communication_preferences.vocabulary: Audience, drop, launch, engagement, reach, cohort, algo, banger, stack

conversion_path.awareness: Short-form video from a creator using the system to identify their banger
conversion_path.retention: Weekly 'what's working' report + peer creator community
